day name: The Dormition of Saint Anna, Mother of the Most Holy Godbearer,
title: , Mother of the Most Holy Godbearer
name: Anna
Olympiada and Eupraxia
troparia: (Tone 4) O godly-minded Anna,* you bore in your womb the pure Mother of God, who gave birth to Life.* Rejoicing, therefore, in glory* you have passed today to a heavenly inheritance,* where those who exult have their dwelling.* There you intercede for the forgiveness of sins* of those who love you, O ever-blessed one.
kontakia: (Tone 2) We feast the memory of the forebears of Christ* as with faith we beseech them to help us* and rescue from every affliction* those who cry out: Our God is with us,* the God whose will it was to glorify them.
